---
title: "Maximum Intensity Projection Weighed by Statistical Cues"
author:
  - name: Peter Mindek
date: "2011-05-01"
categories: [conference paper]
citation:
  type: paper-conference
  container-title: "CESCG'2011: Proceedings of the 15th Central European Seminar on Computer Graphics"
  publisher: "Vienna University of Economics and Business Administration"
  isbn: "978-3-9502533-3-7"
  page: "149-155"
---
